home.headline: Decide.
home.subline: A sharper mirror for the choices that keep asking for your attention.
home.historyEmptyBody: Start with the choice you keep rationalizing. The app will do the uncomfortable part.
home.successRateEmpty: Need more completed decisions before the graph says anything honest.
home.outcomeLoopBody: "{{title}}" has been unresolved for {{days}} days. Mark how it actually landed.

patternSummary.regretBody: {{regrets}} of {{total}} completed decisions ended in regret. Your pattern is asking for more friction.
patternSummary.worthItBody: {{worthIt}} of {{total}} completed decisions held up well. Your pattern improves when you wait for clean conviction.
patternSummary.mixedBody: {{mixed}} of {{total}} completed decisions landed in the middle. Your problem may be weak clarity, not bad instinct.

create.titleStep: Name the decision before the story gets too flattering.
create.titleHint: This should be specific enough to sting.
create.notePlaceholder: What are you telling yourself to make this feel justified?
create.prosStep: What genuinely makes this a yes?
create.prosHint: Keep the list honest. Glamour points don't count unless they matter.
create.prosPlaceholder: It would remove a real bottleneck
create.consStep: What makes this heavier than it looks?
create.consHint: Name the friction you usually smooth over.
create.weightsStep: Now stop pretending every point matters equally.
create.weightsHint: Weight each signal and tag the emotional bias behind it.
create.reviewStep: This is the shape of the choice right now.
create.reviewHint: Delay it if clarity still feels rented.
create.validationTitle: The decision still isn't clear enough.
create.validationBody: Give it a title and at least one pro and one con before asking for the verdict.

patterns.similarRegret: A very similar decision already ended in regret.
patterns.similarMixed: A close version of this call already landed as mixed.
patterns.expensiveRegret: Your expensive calls tend to age badly.
patterns.desireUnderperforms: When desire drives harder than logic, your outcomes usually soften.

patternMetrics.expensiveBody: {{misses}} of {{total}} similarly priced decisions ended mixed or regret.
patternMetrics.desireBody: Only {{worthIt}} of {{total}} desire-led decisions ended as worth it.
patternMetrics.repeatBody: {{misses}} of {{total}} close repeats failed to end cleanly.

settings.headline: Settings
settings.subline: Keep the interface quiet, adaptive, and immediate. Theme changes should feel native, not theatrical.
settings.dynamicIconBody: Use the Material You launcher icon when your Android launcher supports themed icons.
settings.previewBody: The interface should feel like a calm interrogation, not a form.

headlines.yes: This can stand up to scrutiny.
headlines.no: This asks for more than it gives back.
headlines.pause: You do not have clean conviction yet.

sublines.yes: The signal is positive, but not blind.
sublines.no: The friction is doing you a favor.

narratives.commit: This looks grounded enough to move on purpose.
narratives.release: Walking away here is a form of discipline.
narratives.pause: Clarity is not late. Impulse is.
narratives.historyRepeat: You've made a close cousin of this call before. That memory matters.
narratives.moneyConflict: You said stability matters. The price disagrees.
narratives.impulse: This feels emotionally loud and logically underdressed.

realityChecks.thin_evidence: You're trying to decide with very little evidence.
realityChecks.price_vs_pressure: You said money pressure exists. This choice still demands cash.
realityChecks.impulse_bias: This reads more like urgency theater than a clean need.
realityChecks.history_repeat: You've been here before, and the pattern was not flattering.
realityChecks.desire_over_logic: Emotion is driving harder than logic right now.
realityChecks.cons_heavy: The downside already carries more weight than the upside.
realityChecks.need_more_time: The honest answer may be 'not yet'.
